name: TradingNexus
description: A production-ready trading platform with real-time data, premium UX, and scalable architecture.
longDescription: TradingNexus is a full-stack trading platform built for serious market participants. It combines real-time market data, strategy tooling, and a premium user experience on a cloud-native architecture designed to scale.
highlights: Production deployment on Coolify with Docker
Modern Next.js frontend with FastAPI backend
PostgreSQL and Redis for performance at scale

caseStudy.challenge: Build a trading platform that feels premium, handles live market workflows, and can run reliably in production — without compromising on UX or architecture quality.
caseStudy.solution: Designed a modular system with a Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL for persistence, and Redis for caching. Deployed via Docker on Coolify with clear separation between data, API, and presentation layers.
caseStudy.outcome: A live production platform at tradingnexus.pro with real-time capabilities, scalable infrastructure, and a user experience built to professional standards.

architecture.summary: Three-tier cloud-native architecture optimized for real-time trading workflows and horizontal scaling.

layers.name: Presentation
layers.role: Premium UI, real-time dashboards, client-side state

layers.name: API
layers.role: Business logic, market data orchestration, authentication
